item.title: TNG-Waste-To-Energy-incinerator-Vuda
item.description: Yes, we have a major household waste crisis in a number of parts of Fiji but if the Vuda-SaweniÂ proposal is given the go-ahead there is no way that a $1.4 billion proj
item.content:encoded: Yes, we have a major household waste crisis in a number of parts of Fiji but if the Vuda-SaweniÂ proposal is given the go-ahead there is no way that a $1.4 billion proj
